text.title: Ads Conversion Tracking Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Ads Conversion Tracking. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Browser-only pixel; iOS users lost; smart bidding optimizes on 60% of true signal; CPA understated 30%.
antipattern.fix: Implement CAPI alongside Pixel; configure event_id dedup; verify match-rate >= 70%.

antipattern.symptom: Server + browser both fire; conversions inflated 40%; ROAS inflated; budget over-scaled.
antipattern.fix: Add event_id (UUID per conversion) on both sides; verify dedup rate in dashboard.

antipattern.symptom: 7-day click window on 45-day B2B sales-cycle; CPA appears infinite; campaigns paused incorrectly.
antipattern.fix: Match window to sales-cycle median; consider 60-day + offline upload for long cycles.

antipattern.symptom: Conversion events fire but $ value missing; tROAS bidding falls back to tCPA; margin erodes.
antipattern.fix: Add predicted LTV or transaction value per event; back-fill via offline upload where needed.
